design_philosophy: Editorial fashion magazine meets refined craftsmanship. The design must evoke trust, permanence, and quiet confidence. Generous whitespace, distinctive typography, and high-quality photography are the primary visual drivers. Avoid generic 'SaaS-like' components—everything must feel tactile, deliberate, and high-end. No heavy drop shadows; rely on crisp 1px borders and organic background shifts.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid_rules: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for Four Pillars and Editorial sections. Grid items must have internal padding of p-8 or p-12 if bordered. Avoid perfectly equal squares.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#1A1918] text-white. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1918] text-[#1A1918]. Hover effects: bg-[#363432] or subtle scale.
components.cards: Cardless layout preferred. If container is needed, use bg-[#F3F1EC] with 0px radius. No drop shadows. Use 1px border-[#EAE5DC] if separation is required.
components.inputs: Shadcn form inputs customized. border-b-2 border-transparent border-b-[#EAE5DC] bg-[#FAF9F5] rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:border-b-[#1A1918] focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-[#A39D90].
components.header: Sticky header, bg-[#FAF9F5]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EAE5DC]. z-50. Minimal, centered logo.
components.ticker_bar: Infinite marquee using React Fast Marquee. bg-[#1A1918] text-[#FAF9F5] py-2.5 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.2em].
components.product_grid: Grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. High-aspect ratio images (4:5 or 3:4). Clean typography below image (Title, Price, Material tags).
components.mega_menu: Shadcn Navigation Menu heavily customized. Full-width dropdown with editorial image blocks and categorized text links.
components.drawer: Shadcn Sheet for Cart and Wishlist. Right side slide-in. Elegant close button, generous padding.
components.accordion: Shadcn Accordion for FAQs. 1px border-b-[#EAE5DC], no side borders. Large, elegant font for triggers.

animations.hover: Subtle image scale up (transform scale-105 duration-700 ease-out) inside an overflow-hidden container.

hero.description: Woman wearing minimalist gold necklace in black spaghetti strap. Use for main landing hero to signify 'Everyday Wear'.

product_macro.description: Close-up of luxury gold and diamond ring. Use in 'Four Pillars' section to highlight VVS clarity.

product_lifestyle.description: Elegant gold diamond necklace layout. Use for collections/category preview.

bridal_section.description: Elegant bride wearing gold jewelry. Use in Bridal consultation booking section.

gifting_packaging.description: Luxury jewelry box and packaging. Use for Gift Banner / Unboxing section.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='cart-drawer-trigger').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure #5E5950 on #FAF9F5 meets minimum APCA/WCAG ratios. Focus states must use 1px solid #1A1918.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for scroll and hover animations.
Implement Shadcn UI heavily but strip the default styling (remove default radii, drop shadows, and Vercel-like aesthetics). Override classes to match the pure, minimal editorial vibe.
Create a 'MegaMenu' using Shadcn Navigation Menu, ensuring it spans full width and looks like a high-end fashion catalog.
Ensure the layout relies on generous padding (py-24 to py-32) to separate distinct sections.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided image URLs strictly.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body/labels.
Use data-testid attributes universally for testing.
